issue_title: useQueryState causes a navigation to trailing slash with search param w/ TanStack Router
issue_body_preview:
## Context

What's your version of `nuqs`?

```
  "name": "nuqs-bug",
    "nuqs": "^2.7.3",
```

What framework are you using?

TanStack Router

Which version of your framework are you using?

```
    "@tanstack/react-devtools": "^0.7.0",
    "@tanstack/react-router": "^1.132.0",
    "@tanstack/reac
test_description_zh: 在使用 TanStack Router 的应用中，访问一个不带尾部斜杠的页面路径，使用 useQueryState 设置一个查询参数，观察浏览器地址栏中的 URL 变化。
expected_result_zh: 设置查询参数后，URL 应正确更新为包含搜索参数的路径，路径部分不应出现多余的尾部斜杠（trailing slash）。例如从 /page 设置参数后应为 /page?key=value，而不是 /page/?key=value。
